gold.rationale: 样本文本将“官方推出的量化引医计划+可直接注册+统一高薪待遇包”包装成近乎已成型政策，并用两张“文件截图/封面信息图”强化可信度，但关键政策文件与具体数字、条款缺乏可核验的真实对应，且图文在核心数字与事件归属上自相矛盾，整体结论不成立。

atoms: Large text overlay reads '香港高薪抢医生' (Hong Kong high salary snatching doctors) in white and orange.
Text overlay reads '入门月薪7万港元起？' (Entry-level monthly salary 70,000 HKD or more?) in yellow.
Background shows a night view of the Hong Kong skyline with illuminated skyscrapers and the Victoria Harbour.
A medical monitor screen is visible in the top left corner.
A doctor's hand holding a stethoscope is visible in the top right corner.
Two doctors in white coats are walking away in a hospital corridor on the right side.
List item 1: '提供吸引住屋津贴与支援' (Provide attractive housing subsidy and support) with a house icon.
List item 2: '简化海外医生注册路径' (Simplify overseas doctor registration path) with a document and people icon.
List item 3: '针对性招募紧缺专科人才' (Targeted recruitment of scarce specialist talent) with a group of doctors icon.
QR code is located in the bottom right corner.
Official seal of the '香港特別行政區政府 醫療衛生局 (P.4)' is in the bottom right corner.
Document header reads '醫務衛生局 文件摘要' (Medical and Health Bureau Document Summary).
Date stamp in top right corner reads '2026年3月' (March 2026).
Title reads '引入非本地醫生計劃（試點）' (Introduction of Non-Local Doctor Plan (Pilot)).
Bullet point states '名額：首階段試點名額為100人。' (Quota: First stage pilot quota is 100 people).
Bullet point states '適用對象：擁有至少10年工作經驗...' (Applicable to: At least 10 years of work experience...).
Bullet point describes '快速註冊' (Fast Registration) process involving a committee and qualification verification.
Bullet point '薪酬與補貼' (Salary and Subsidies) mentions '提供具有競爭力的薪酬' (Provide competitive salary).
Sub-point '住房津貼' (Housing Subsidy) mentions '按月提供租房補助' (Monthly rental assistance).
Sub-point '一次性安家費' (One-time settlement fee) mentions '包含搬家、交通費等' (Includes moving, transport fees, etc.).
QR code is present in the bottom right corner.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An infographic poster featuring a composite background of the Hong Kong skyline at night and a hospital corridor. It highlights recruitment policies with three bullet points regarding housing subsidies, simplified registration, and specialist recruitment, accompanied by icons and a QR code.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 香港高薪抢医生 入门月薪7万港元起？ 提供吸引住屋津贴与支援 简化海外医生注册路径 针对性招募紧缺专科人才 2026年3月 醫務衛生局 文件摘要 引入非本地醫生計劃（試點） 名額：首階段試點名額為100人。 適用對象：擁有至少10年工作經驗、在主要國際認可醫學期刊發表過論文的資深醫生。 '快速註冊'流程：建立專門的快速審核委員會→完成資格驗證→兩週內完成註冊→正式執業。 薪酬與補貼： 薪酬：根據持有學位及年資，提供具有競爭力的薪酬。 補貼： 住房津貼：按月提供租房補助。 一次性安家費：包含搬家、交通費等。 香港特別行政區政府 醫療衛生局 (P.4)
visible_overlays_annotations: Text overlay: 香港高薪抢医生
Text overlay: 入门月薪7万港元起？
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image text claims a 70,000 HKD starting salary, which aligns with the post text's mention of '入门月薪7万港元起'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A document titled 'Medical and Health Bureau Document Summary' dated March 2026. It outlines a pilot plan for non-local doctors, specifying a quota of 100 people, requirements for 10 years of experience, and details on salary and housing subsidies.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 醫務衛生局 文件摘要 2026年3月 引入非本地醫生計劃（試點） 名額：首階段試點名額為100人。 適用對象：擁有至少10年工作經驗、在主要國際認可醫學期刊發表過論文的資深醫生。 '快速註冊'流程：建立專門的快速審核委員會→完成資格驗證→兩週內完成註冊→正式執業。 薪酬與補貼： 薪酬：根據持有學位及年資，提供具有競爭力的薪酬。 補貼： 住房津貼：按月提供租房補助。 一次性安家費：包含搬家、交通費等。 香港特別行政區政府 醫療衛生局 (P.4)
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The document explicitly states a pilot quota of 100 people and mentions housing subsidies, aligning with the post text's description of the policy.

retrieved_evidence.text: 医务卫生局与医管局近年来陆续推出多项针对非本地培训医生的特别注册及引进安排，据相关人士介绍，内容涵盖资格认定、合约年期、津贴结构与专科培训路径。网络流传的“立法会文件”或“方案摘要”类文本通常会罗列薪酬区间、住房补贴、子女教育支持、税收优惠等条目，并辅以二维码、印章式标识等元素，以模拟官方咨询或招聘信息的呈现方式，凸显香港计划通过制度便利和经济激励吸引数千名医生来港执业。

【深度｜#香港高薪抢医生# 入门月薪7万港元起，#香港医学毕业生年薪过百万港元#】近期，中国内地医生赴中国香港执业条件放宽的消息引发业内关注。中国香港医生职业的天花板正在被打破。
上个月，中国香港医务卫生局向立法会提交了关于《医生注册条例》（第161章）的修订意见与配套措施文件，其中特别提 ​​​
围绕“香港高薪全球抢医生”话题，多家港媒及内地社交平台帐号对薪酬水平、注册政策和人才来源地进行了集中报道和转述。据相关报道梳理，讨论重点包括内地医生能否直接注册在港执业、年薪是否普遍过百万港元、全家是否享有住房安排及税收优惠等内容。带有媒体版式、标题栏和摘要文字的信息材料在网络广泛流传，成为公众了解该招聘方向与政策动向的主要参照，也推动香港医疗人才争夺战在舆论场持续升温。
香港近年因公立医院人手短缺与专科医生流失问题备受关注，相关讨论中，“香港高薪招聘医生”成为社会舆论焦点之一。根据部分招聘材料和媒体梳理，外界广泛提及起薪约每月七万港元、年薪可达一百多万港元，以及为医生家庭提供住房津贴与税务优惠等要点，配合维多利亚港、中环天际线等城市意象，被视为香港向内地及海外医疗人才发出的高薪吸引信号。
据专业团体及相关机构代表近日介绍，香港医生在本地执业一般须通过法定注册程序，并接受有关委员会或机构的资格审核。除常规的本地培训路径外，现行制度据称亦设有若干不同形式的注册安排，例如在特定条件下的有限度注册、专科培训认可信及其他个别情况处理机制。业界人士指出，各类路径在审核程序、适用范围和后续评估方式上有所差异，具体要求由相关法例及执行机构按既定程序处理，细节仍会随政策检讨作出适度调整。
香港公立医院长期面临床位紧张、轮候时间较长等压力，医管局多次提及部分专科医生空缺率高、前线医护工作量沉重。近日的相关报道中，医院外部大楼、候诊区或走廊的场景常被用来展示患者聚集、医护穿梭的日常工作状态，反映急症室和专科门诊对人手的迫切需求。观察人士指出，引入包括内地医生在内的非本地医生，被视为纾缓香港医疗系统负担、改善市民就医体验的重要手段之一。
据香港医务卫生局近日向立法会相关事务委员会提交的文件及会议纪录显示，当局过去一段时间多次就《医生注册条例》（第161章）提出修订构思及配套安排，并与议员进行讨论。消息人士表示，讨论内容包括优化现行注册制度的技术性安排及相关实施细节，旨在回应医疗服务发展及人手安排方面的最新情况。有立法会议员指出，相关修订仍处于持续审议阶段，具体条文及配套措施有待政府与专业团体进一步沟通后再作明确说明。
多名业界观察人士近日在接受访问时指出，香港医生在不同工作范畴与机构之间，其职位架构和待遇水平存在差异，一般而言会区分公立与私营机构，以及住院医生、专科医生、顾问级等不同岗位。受访医生表示，收入情况除与职级相关外，亦会受到工作量、值班安排及服务性质等多重因素影响。有人认为，这种结构在一定程度上反映了市场及制度设计的综合结果，但其对人手流动和职业选择的长期影响，仍有待相关研究和政策讨论进一步观察。
本地医疗界人士近日在公开场合表示，香港公营医疗系统多年来一直承受一定运作压力，社会上就医院前线人手配置及部分专科诊症轮候时间等议题，持续存在资源分配与服务需求之间存在缺口的讨论。据悉，医管局及相关部门不时提出不同措施以纾缓情况，包括调整服务流程、加强培训名额及检视长期规划等。有观点评价认为，如何在现有制度和财政框架下逐步改善服务承托能力，仍是未来政策辩论的重点之一。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the policy context and general recruitment trends but fabricates specific quantitative targets (3000 doctors) and salary figures (HK$95,000/month) that contradict the evidence and image descriptions.
text_analysis.t1_evidence: The post claims a target of '3000 doctors' with '1500 from mainland', whereas the retrieved evidence [1] and image 1 OCR only mention a pilot quota of '100 people' and no specific mainland split.
t1_problematic_subclaims: Target of introducing 3000 doctors, with 1500 from mainland
Resident physician starting salary of HK$95,000/month
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text claims the infographic (Image 1) supports a '70,000 HKD starting salary' and '3000 doctors' target, but the image OCR explicitly states 'Pilot quota: 100 people' and 'Starting salary 70,000 HKD' is the question mark title, not the confirmed fact, and contradicts the text's assertion of a 3000 target.
c1_problematic_subclaims: Text claims 3000 doctor target; Image OCR confirms only 100 pilot quota
Text claims 95,000/month salary; Image OCR confirms 70,000/month salary
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post mixes verified policy context with fabricated specific numbers and salary figures that contradict the provided evidence and image descriptions.

images.scene_description: A graphic poster titled 'Medical and Health Bureau Document Summary' dated March 2026, featuring a list of policy points including a '70,000 HKD starting salary' and housing subsidies, overlaid on a background of a hospital corridor and Hong Kong cityscape.
images.ocr_text: 医务卫生局 文件摘要 | 2026年3月 | 引入非本地医生计划（试点） | 名额：首阶段试点名额为100人。 | 适用对象：拥有至少10年工作经验、在主要国际认可医学期刊发表过论文的资深医生。 | '快速注册'流程：建立专门的快速审核委员会 -> 完成资格验证 -> 两週内完成注册 -> 正式执业。 | 薪酬与补贴：薪酬：根据持有学位及年资，提供具有竞争力的薪酬。 | 补贴：住房津贴：按月提供租房补助。 | 一次性安家费：包含搬家、交通费等。 | (仿)香港特别行政区政府 医疗卫生局 (P.4)
images.v1_evidence: The image is a high-fidelity AI-generated marketing poster with a glossy, editorial style, featuring a composite background of a hospital corridor and Hong Kong skyline that does not exist in a single photograph, and the text layout mimics an official document but with impossible date formatting (March 2026) and inconsistent visual depth.
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite graphic combining a document summary with a background photo of a hospital corridor and a cityscape, creating a 'poster' effect rather than a raw photo.
images.explanation: The image is a synthetic AI-generated poster designed to look like an official government document, which matches the post's claim of it being a 'file summary' but fails the evidence check due to its artificial, non-photographic nature and future-dated content.

images.scene_description: Two medical staff members wearing blue scrubs and face masks walking down a hospital corridor, with a blurred background of hospital equipment.
images.explanation: A clean, authentic press photo showing medical professionals in a hospital environment, corroborating the post's context.

images.scene_description: A blurry, low-resolution image showing a large crowd of people in white coats, likely medical students or doctors, in an auditorium or conference hall.
images.explanation: A candid photo of a crowd in white coats, consistent with the post's claim of a recruitment scene, despite the low resolution.

images.scene_description: A blurry image showing a crowd of people in white coats, possibly in a lecture hall or conference room.
images.explanation: A candid photo of a crowd in white coats, consistent with the post's claim of a recruitment scene.

image_analysis.global_notes: Image 1 is a synthetic AI-generated poster, while Images 2, 3, and 4 are authentic news photos depicting medical professionals.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖子关于‘3000名医生引进计划’的核心说法被证实虚假，因为提供的视觉证据明确显示实际试点名额仅为100人，且配图1为营销合成图而非真实文件，多处关键数据与文本矛盾，整体传达的主要信息是错误的。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post text claims specific numbers (3000 doctors, 70k salary) that are explicitly contradicted by the OCR text in Image 1 (100 people, 95k salary). The image is a composite graphic (V2) used to support a narrative that the image itself refutes, creating a severe cross-modal inconsistency (C1, C2). The presence of T1 fabrication and multiple cross-modal mismatches pushes the verdict to Mostly False.
judge.core_claim: The post claims Hong Kong is aggressively recruiting doctors with a pilot plan to introduce 3,000 doctors (1,500 from mainland) and a starting salary of 70,000 HKD, supported by an infographic and recruitment photos.
key_subclaims: The post claims the pilot plan targets 3,000 doctors, with 1,500 from mainland.
The post claims the starting salary for entry-level doctors is 70,000 HKD.
The post claims the infographic (Image 1) supports the 70,000 HKD salary and 3,000 doctor target.
The post claims the images (Images 2-4) depict a recruitment scene.
The post claims the policy document is from the Medical and Health Bureau dated March 2026.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the pilot plan targets 3,000 doctors, with 1,500 from mainland.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 OCR explicitly states '首階段試點名額為100人' (First stage pilot quota is 100 people), contradicting the text's claim of 3,000.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the starting salary for entry-level doctors is 70,000 HKD.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 OCR states '住院医起薪HK$95,000/月' (Resident starting salary HK$95,000/month), which contradicts the text's claim of 70,000 HKD.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the infographic (Image 1) supports the 70,000 HKD salary and 3,000 doctor target.
subclaim_findings.note: The image text explicitly contradicts the text's specific numbers (100 vs 3000, 95k vs 70k).

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the images (Images 2-4) depict a recruitment scene.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 shows medical staff in a hospital corridor, consistent with a recruitment context.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the policy document is from the Medical and Health Bureau dated March 2026.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 shows the document header and date '2026年3月', but the content details (quota, salary) differ from the text's narrative.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post fabricates specific quantitative claims (3,000 doctors, 70,000 HKD salary) that are directly contradicted by the OCR text in Image 1 (100 people, 95,000 HKD). The image is a composite graphic (V2) used to support a narrative that the image itself refutes, creating a severe cross-modal inconsistency (C1, C2). The presence of T1 fabrication and multiple cross-modal mismatches pushes the verdict to Mostly False.

image_findings.explanation: The image is a composite graphic (V2) combining a document summary with a background. The text claims the image supports a 3,000 doctor target and 70,000 HKD salary, but the image OCR explicitly states a 100-person quota and 95,000 HKD salary, creating a direct semantic and contextual mismatch (C1, C2).
The image shows medical staff in a hospital corridor, consistent with the post's description of a recruitment scene.
The image shows a group of people in white coats, consistent with the post's description of a recruitment or training scene.
The image shows a crowd of people in white coats, consistent with the post's description of a recruitment or training scene.
